narrative:
Perry township has 18,769 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.1 percentage points.
